value.found_quote: A project CLAUDE.md can be stored in either ./CLAUDE.md or ./.claude/CLAUDE.md. Create this file and add instructions that apply to anyone working on the project
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes project-scoped CLAUDE.md files (./CLAUDE.md or ./.claude/CLAUDE.md) that Claude Code reads at the start of every session, matching the claim about project memory in a CLAUDE.md file.
